title: Overloading
doc_html:
§851.11.  Overloading

No watercraft shall be loaded with passengers or cargo beyond its safe carrying capacity taking into consideration weather and other existing operating conditions.

Acts 1960, No. 43, §11.  Acts 1984, No. 288, §1.
